regressions.reasoning: Stage_02 only required a version bump to 4.1 while explicitly preserving the /app vhost, app-queue with messages, and overall cluster health -- it did not call for breaking management-API/TLS connectivity. A total failure to query nodes, policies, permissions, and queue state (not just a version or minor state diff) indicates the agent's upgrade approach broke core cluster functionality (e.g., TLS listener/management plugin or clustering) rather than a state change stage_02 legitimately intended.
